hero.title: The Emerald Pour
hero.subtitle: North Carolina's Premier Mobile Irish Pub Experience
hero.description: Bring the authentic Irish pub atmosphere to your event. Premium mobile bar service for weddings, corporate events, and celebrations across the Carolinas.

services.title: Our Services
services.weddingsDesc: Create unforgettable memories with our mobile Irish pub at your wedding venue.
services.corporateDesc: Impress clients and colleagues with premium craft beverages and authentic atmosphere.
services.privateDesc: Birthdays, anniversaries, and celebrations — we bring the pub to you.
services.stpatricksDesc: The ultimate St. Paddy's celebration with traditional Irish fare and drinks.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by couples, companies, and celebration planners across the Carolinas

t1.quote: The Emerald Pour transformed our wedding reception. Guests are still talking about the Guinness taps and Irish whiskey selection six months later.
t1.name: Sarah & Michael

t2.quote: Professional from start to finish. Our corporate holiday party felt like a premium Dublin pub — without leaving Raleigh.
t2.name: James Whitfield

t3.quote: Best St. Patrick's Day party we've ever hosted. The team handled everything — setup, service, and breakdown flawlessly.
t3.name: The O'Brien Family

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: We collect information you provide when booking our mobile Irish pub services, including your name, email, phone number, event details, and payment information processed securely through Stripe.
privacy.s2Body: Your data is used to process bookings, send confirmations, manage contracts, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s3Body: All data is stored with tenant-level isolation using PostgreSQL Row Level Security. Payment data is handled exclusively by Stripe and never stored on our servers.
privacy.s4Body: We use essential cookies for authentication and locale preferences. We do not use third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.s5Body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting bookings@emeraldpour.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Body: A deposit of 25%, 50%, or 100% is required to secure your event date. The remaining balance is due before the event date unless otherwise agreed in writing.
terms.s2Body: Cancellations made more than 30 days before the event receive a full deposit refund. Cancellations within 30 days forfeit the deposit. Weather-related cancellations will be rescheduled at no additional cost.
terms.s3Body: The Emerald Pour serves North and South Carolina. Delivery costs are calculated based on distance from our Charlotte base at $2.50 per mile.
terms.s4Body: We carry full liability insurance. Clients are responsible for obtaining any required venue permits. Guests must be 21+ for alcohol service with valid ID.

footer.tagline: Premium mobile Irish pub catering across the Carolinas
